commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

feat(core): global registry and output-returning constructors

Resource constructors now register entries in a global registry as a
side effect and return Proxy-based ResourceHandle objects instead of
leaking internal ResourceEntry fields to users. Each handle is also
an Output (path "") so it can be used directly with secret() or in
env vars, while property access (.host, .result, etc.) returns Output
for specific keys.

- Add global registry with begin/collect lifecycle and scope stack
- Rename internal resource() to createConstructor()
- New user-facing resource() as composition primitive for grouping
- loadConfig and client-generate use registry instead of export scanning
- Handler output types relaxed from Record<string, unknown> to unknown
- Runtime constructors return typed handles (ServiceHandle, VolumeHandle)
- Remove as casts in dev.ts, up.ts, and core internals
- Update demo config to use registry-based (no-export) pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix flood water rendering: use idle event instead of setTimeout

The setTimeout(300) fires while fitBounds animation is in progress,
causing isStyleLoaded() to return false and skipping flood rendering.
Now uses map.once('idle') which fires after all tiles are loaded.
Also removes isStyleLoaded() guard from moveend handler since
queryRenderedFeatures is already wrapped in try-catch.

- Set output: standalone in next.config.ts for Docker multi-stage builds
- Reference AGENTS.md from root CLAUDE.md
- Remove local eslint.config.mjs (eslint-plugin-react v7 incompatible with ESLint v10)

* feat: add placeholder pages, env validation, and middleware for beatdown-app (Refs #10)

- Update globals.css with shadcn/ui CSS variables and Tailwind v4 @theme inline tokens
- Create components.json for shadcn/ui configuration
- Create src/lib/utils.ts with cn() helper
- Create src/lib/env.ts for validated environment variable exports
- Update layout.tsx with app title/description

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add Dockerfile, Docker Compose, and env template for beatdown-app (Refs #10)

- Multi-stage Dockerfile (deps/builder/runner) using Node 24 Alpine
- Build context is monorepo root so pnpm resolves workspace deps correctly
- output: standalone enables .next/standalone for minimal runner image
- docker-compose.yml: postgres:16-alpine (db) + Next.js app service
- DB service has health check; app depends_on db with health condition
- .env.local.example documents all required environment variables
- Run migrations: docker compose run --rm app sh -c "cd /repo && pnpm --filter beatdown-app run db:migrate"
- Exclude .env* from .gitignore but allow .env.local.example

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: migrate middleware to proxy, fix lint config for Next.js build output (Refs #10)

- Rename src/middleware.ts to src/proxy.ts (middleware is deprecated in Next.js 16)
- Rename exported function from middleware() to proxy()
- Add **/.next/ to root ESLint ignores to prevent linting compiled build output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: set LEFTHOOK=0 in Dockerfile to skip git hook install on Alpine (Refs #10)

lefthook's postinstall script calls `lefthook install` which requires git,
but node:24-alpine doesn't include git. LEFTHOOK=0 suppresses the hook
installation while still allowing other build scripts (e.g. sharp) to run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resolve Docker build failures for Alpine/lefthook compatibility

- Add git to deps stage (apk add) so lefthook install can run
- Initialize dummy git repo before pnpm install to satisfy lefthook
- Add .dockerignore to prevent node_modules conflict during COPY
- Consolidate consecutive RUN instructions per Dockerfile best practices

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address code review feedback on PR #21 (Refs #10)

- eslint.config.mjs: add **/*.tsx to TypeScript files glob so React
  components get type-aware linting
- apps/beatdown-app/src/lib/env.ts: use getter for databaseUrl to avoid
  eager MODULE_NOT_FOUND at build time
- .dockerignore: add **/.env*, **/coverage, **/*.log to prevent secrets
  leaking into Docker build context
- apps/beatdown-app/package.json: add "type": "module" and engines field
  per monorepo conventions
- apps/beatdown-app/public/: remove boilerplate create-next-app SVGs
- apps/beatdown-app/CLAUDE.md: document tsconfig exception for Next.js apps
- apps/beatdown-app/src/proxy.ts: update TODO to reference issue #11

commit.message:
fix(fix-bugs): fix silent push failure, shell injection, and JSON fence bugs

Three issues fixed:

1. commitAndPush() always returned true even when git push failed, causing
   PR creation to request a branch that never reached the remote (→ 422
   "invalid head" from GitHub API). Now returns false if both push attempts
   fail, so the issue is skipped instead of crashing.

2. git commit -m "..." broke if Claude's summary contained double quotes.
   Fixed by writing the message to .git/AUTOMATED_COMMIT_MSG and using
   git commit -F instead.

3. Claude occasionally wraps its JSON response in ```json fences despite
   instructions not to. Strip fences before JSON.parse, matching the same
   fix already applied to detect-bugs.mjs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add pyphony-sv supervisor with auto-update on merge (#8)

Adds a supervisor mode that runs pyphony in a loop: git pull --rebase,
then launch the app with --exit-on-merge. When an agent completes a task
(writes [DONE]), the service exits with code 10, the supervisor pulls
fresh code and restarts automatically.

- New `pyphony-sv` entry point and convenience shell wrapper
- New `--exit-on-merge` CLI flag for pyphony run
- Orchestrator signals merge via exit code 10 when issue transitions to Done

feat(hooks): add TypeScript type check and duplicate action detection hooks

Post-tool-use hooks that run after every file edit:

- type_check.js: runs tsc --noEmit after TypeScript file edits and feeds
  type errors back to Claude so it immediately fixes broken call sites

- duplicate_check.js: detects duplicate exported functions in src/actions/,
  blocking Claude from creating a new action when one already exists

Skip files with extensions in middleware redirect

Paths like /icon.svg were being caught by the catch-all redirect
to /minibus-hire/icon.svg, causing a 404. Now any path ending in a
file extension is passed through.

fix: correct React Three Fiber material syntax in ContactCharacter

After: <meshStandardMaterial color={...} metalness={...} /> (correct)

release: clime v0.2.0

Squash merge of trunk onto main.

Highlights:
- Ancestor option propagation (group/app options visible to all descendants)
- Two-pass parse with :setup hook for lazy choices/defaults
- clime-params-plist helper
- :separator slot for list-type options
- :category slot for grouped help sections
- Collect-based help renderer with inline group support
- Symlink-resolving shebang for init
- Separated shebang format version (clime-sh!:vN) from library version
- Entrypoint/library split (clime-make-main.el)

feat: add audio, website, and image OCR converters

Add three new conversion modes to complement the existing PDF converter:
- Audio → Markdown: whisper.cpp local engine + OpenAI cloud, live mic recording, speaker detection
- Website → Markdown: reader-mode extraction with SSRF protection, DOM walking, image download
- Image OCR → Markdown: tesseract CLI (no build-time C deps) + OpenAI Vision cloud fallback

Also includes PDF pipeline improvements (table detection, gap-based merging,
text-edge column detection), comprehensive security hardening (HTTP timeouts,
size limits, URL validation), and updated documentation.

activity log entries when a ticket's priority is changed

component for visual consistency

the colored icon alongside the priority text for both old and new values
- [ ] Verify all six priority levels display the correct icon and color
- [ ] Verify the badge still renders correctly when priority value is
unknown/null

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Add project hero banner, Gantt timeline, full integration layer, and backend services

- Add ProjectHeroBanner with dark gradient, 5 KPI cards, and project timeline stepper
- Add ProjectOverviewPanel with feature/module progress cards and risk derivation
- Add ProjectPlanGantt with CSS grid Gantt chart for planned vs actual timelines
- Expand ADO integration: parent-child linking, date fields, write-back allowlist

- Add sync pipeline with epic_id resolution and dual-format normalizer
- Add sprint planning workspace, AI sprint generation, and plan approval modal
- Add sprint forecast panel with success probability and spillover risk
- Add GitHub monitoring, commit activity feed, and PR tracking
- Add notification system with in-app, Slack, and Teams delivery
- Add velocity calculator, failure analysis, and sprint completion services
- Add WebSocket real-time context with auto-reconnect and heartbeat
- Add project selection context with persistent preferences
- Add cachedFetch with TTL-based request deduplication
- Update sidebar, topbar, and auth components for new navigation
- Update README with new API endpoints and write-back allowlist

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Spotify integration, Tidal player, MapLibre native maps, and major architecture overhaul

- Add Spotify Connect integration (Python service + C++ SpotifyClient + QML screen)
  using librespot for audio playback and spotipy for Web API
- Add Tidal HiFi integration (Python service + C++ TidalClient + QML screen)
  with GStreamer playbin audio and queue management
- Migrate maps from WebEngine to MapLibre Native Qt (saves ~264MB RAM)
  with GPS, search, routing, style switching, and custom layers
- Split BluetoothManager into 3 focused classes (BT core, TelephonyManager, DeviceModel)
- Extract Main.qml components (VoicePipeline, ScreenContainer, BluetoothHandler)
- Add ThemeValues singleton, Monochrome theme, settings sub-pages
- Add VehicleBusManager (SocketCAN FD), Tuning screen, Weather screen
- Add UpdateManager for OTA updates
- Upgrade Picovoice SDKs to v3.0 (unified pipeline)
- Remove dead code (WebEngine maps, old speech recognizer, unused screens)
- Gitignore large SDK binaries and build artifacts
